faqItems.q: Is this suitable for my child's level?
faqItems.a: Yes. Our diagnostic test assesses your child's current level across all four subjects on day one and builds a path that starts exactly where they are, whether just starting out or already well ahead.

faqItems.q: How is this different from books or a tutor?
faqItems.a: Books give everyone the same content. Tutors are expensive and limited by availability. Kyros adapts to your child's performance, tracks progress automatically, and is available any time for the price of a single tutoring hour per month.

faqItems.q: How often should my child practise?
faqItems.a: 20-30 minutes a day is more effective than long weekend sessions. Kyros is designed for short, focused daily practice, and each topic takes around 20 minutes to complete.

faqItems.q: Do you cover all exam boards?
faqItems.a: Yes. GL Assessment, CEM, Kent Test, and ISEB formats are all covered. Select your child's target schools when setting up their profile and we tailor the content accordingly.

faqItems.q: Can I track my child's progress?
faqItems.a: Yes. The parent dashboard shows progress across all four subjects, highlights weak areas, tracks scores over time, and lets you download a full PDF report at any time.
